narrative.headline: All T1 items cleared! (48 review findings — run `desloppify issues`)

actions.description: 48 review findings need investigation — run `desloppify issues` to see the work queue
7 flat_dirs findings — create subdirectories and use `desloppify move`
2 single_use findings — inline or relocate with `desloppify move`
11 coupling findings — fix boundary violations with `desloppify move`
8 facade findings — flatten re-export facades or consolidate barrel files
1 uncalled_functions findings — remove dead functions or document why they're retained
164 structural findings — decompose large files — extract logic into focused modules
3 props findings — split bloated components, extract sub-components
9 dupes findings — extract shared utility or consolidate duplicates
48 dict_keys findings — fix dict key mismatches — dead writes are likely dead code, schema drift suggests a typo or missed rename
191 test_coverage findings — add tests for untested production modules — prioritize by import count
22 responsibility_cohesion findings — split modules with too many responsibilities — extract focused sub-modules
111 boilerplate_duplication findings — extract shared boilerplate into reusable helpers or base classes
394 smells findings — inspect with `desloppify next` and fix manually
30 global_mutable_config findings — refactor module-level mutable state — use explicit init functions or dependency injection
21 private_imports findings — stop importing private symbols across module boundaries
11 files need design review — run design review with dimension templates

strategy.hint: 4 independent workstreams, safe to parallelize. Rescan after each phase to verify. Review: 48 finding(s) — `desloppify issues`.
